# 4Cs.co.za

South African diamond education published by Prodiam Trading CC.

## Purpose

4Cs.co.za explains diamond cut, colour, clarity, carat, certificates, diamond prices, diamond rings, diamond jewellery, lab-grown comparisons, and selling a diamond ring in South Africa. The site routes readers with a real buying, selling, valuation, or certificate question to Prodiam.

## Publisher

- Publisher: Prodiam Trading CC
- Website: https://www.prodiam.co.za/
- Location: Bedfordview, Johannesburg
- Process: by appointment; 48-hour valuation process; cleared funds in 72 hours after acceptance
- Specialty: certified natural diamonds, GIA Ideal Cut diamonds, estate jewellery, loose stones, diamond-ring valuation, signed pieces, broken-set stones
